subject: masb-agent-ux
verdict: Solid memory agent with rich persona, but capability prompts read as checklists rather than the warm designer character First Breath builds
summary: masb-agent-ux has a well-defined UI/UX Designer persona with four capabilities covering the full design workflow from global design system through per-phase UI to validation. The sanctum is complete, scripts are correct, and First Breath territories are domain-adapted. The main opportunities are infusing persona voice into the capability prompts (they read as dry checklists), fixing two sanctum wiring defects (placeholder mismatch, memlog leaking into runtime), and clarifying accessibility layering across three capabilities.

agent_profile.name: agent-ux
agent_profile.title: UI/UX Designer
agent_profile.mission: Transformer chaque projet Android en une experience visuelle cohérente, accessible et fidèle au Material Design 3

capabilities.name: design-system
capabilities.note: Produit le design system global (palette, typo, icônes, thème M3, accessibilité)

capabilities.name: ui-spec
capabilities.note: Décline le design system pour une phase spécifique

capabilities.name: accessibility-check
capabilities.note: Vérifie l'accessibilité du design (WCAG, contrastes, cibles)

capabilities.name: theme-validate
capabilities.note: Valide la cohérence entre toutes les phases

detailed_analysis.leanness: Four capability prompts carry format-templating checklists; sanctum templates lean with minor redundant content
detailed_analysis.architecture: Sound memory archetype, but CREED carries dead pointer and Pulse refs on non-autonomous agent
detailed_analysis.determinism: One script candidate: theme-validate diff work should be a pre-pass script
detailed_analysis.customization: Metadata-only memory agent, about right, sole mechanism
detailed_analysis.enhancement: Strong persona foundations but capabilities lose the character; fallback handling missing
detailed_analysis.agent-cohesion: Authentic persona with well-aligned capabilities; accessibility layering unclear, no iteration loop
detailed_analysis.sanctum-architecture: Complete and seeded; placeholder mismatch and memlog leak in sanctum

sanctum.note: All 6 standard templates present with meaningful domain-specific seeds. Two wiring issues: project-root/project_root placeholder mismatch in CREED Dominion paths, and .memlog.md leaks into sanctum via copy_references.

journeys.name: First Breath
journeys.steps: Scaffold sanctum → warm calibration conversation → name, vibe, design preferences, mission, capabilities → birthday ceremony

journeys.name: Waking
journeys.steps: Wake via wake.py → become yourself (load sanctum) → bind standing rules → continuity callback or capabilities offer

experience.headless: All 4 capabilities hardcode MASB workspace paths and assume pre-existing files. No path for pre-supplied inputs or automated invocation.

themes.title: Capability prompts are checklists, not the persona
themes.root_cause: First Breath builds a warm, creative designer who 'raconte pourquoi ces couleurs fonctionnent', but all 4 capability prompts are dry bullet lists — the persona voice disappears during execution. The leanness lens identifies the checklist pattern (format templating, yellow-flag NEVER constructions), and the enhancement lens confirms the remedy: open each capability with 1-2 lines of persona stance.
themes.action: Open each capability prompt with persona stance ('Tu es designer, pas un générateur de checklist'), collapse bullet lists to goal sentences, and replace NEVER constructions with positive framing.

themes.title: Sanctum wiring: dead references, placeholder mismatch, memlog leak
themes.root_cause: Three glitches in the sanctum lifecycle: (1) CREED instructs the agent to load prompt-quality-canon.md but it's in SKILL_ONLY_FILES and never copied, (2) CREED-template uses {project-root} (hyphen) but init-sanctum.py provides project_root (underscore) so Dominion paths render as literal placeholders, (3) .memlog.md in references/ leaks into the agent's runtime sanctum via copy_references. The canon pull-in order is additionally inert since EVOLVABLE=False.
themes.action: Add .memlog.md to SKILL_ONLY_FILES, fix placeholder to use matching token, and remove the canon pull-in standing order from CREED-template since the agent is not evolvable.

themes.title: Pulse and stateless vestiges on non-autonomous memory agent
themes.root_cause: INDEX-template, MEMORY-template, and memory-guidance.md reference 'during Pulse' for curation, but Pulse is not enabled for this agent. Simultaneously, memory-guidance.md opens with 'You are stateless', contradicting the Sacred Truth's continuity framing. SKILL.md also mentions --pulse in step 1.
themes.action: Replace 'during Pulse' with 'at natural breaks' or 'at session end', remove the --pulse clause from SKILL.md step 1, and replace 'You are stateless' with 'Your working memory resets between sessions'.

themes.title: Accessibility and iteration gaps in design workflow
themes.root_cause: Three capabilities (DS, AC, TV) touch WCAG without clear layering — DS defines, AC audits, TV monitors — but the boundary is undocumented. No capability validates designs against official Material Design 3 guidelines (elevation semantics, dynamic color, motion). The workflow terminates at TV (deviation report) with no path to revise the DS or US.
themes.action: Document the layering explicitly in each capability's scope, add M3 compliance validation to TV, and add revise-design-system / update-ui-spec capabilities for the iteration loop.

strengths: Rich, domain-specific First Breath with calibration territories tailored to a UI/UX designer relationship
Solid memory agent scaffolding: correct wake.py/init-sanctum.py, all 6 sanctum templates present with domain-specific seeds
Persona voice in SKILL.md, CREED, and PERSONA template is warm, creative, and distinctive — the character feels real
Four capabilities cover the full design workflow end-to-end: global DS → per-phase US → AC → TV cross-phase validation
External skill dependencies (font-m3-cli, material-symbols-cli, adaptive, styles, edge-to-edge) are appropriate for the domain

recommendations.action: Infuse persona voice into all 4 capability prompts — open each with 1-2 lines of stance (collapses checklist findings) and replace numbered bullet sections with goal sentences

Fix sanctum wiring: add .memlog.md to SKILL_ONLY_FILES (sanctum-2), change {project-root} to {project_root} in CREED Dominion paths (sanctum-1), remove canon pull-in from CREED-template since EVOLVABLE=False (architecture-1), replace Pulse refs (architecture-2)

Clarify accessibility layering: DS defines target level, AC audits, TV monitors across phases. Add M3 compliance validation to TV's scope. Add revise-design-system and update-ui-spec capabilities for iteration.
Add graceful fallback for missing workspace files: if brainstorm.md/prd.md don't exist, surface in character and offer to backfill context conversationally
Pre-pass the deterministic comparison work in theme-validate into a script (scripts/extract-design-tokens.py) so the prompt reasons over structured JSON diffs instead of raw files

findings.evidence: Script lacks --help self-documentation

findings.evidence: Output not structured JSON

findings.evidence: No test file found

findings.title: scripts/tests/ directory missing
findings.evidence: No unit tests for any script

findings.title: Design-system DOIT list is format templating
findings.evidence: Six bullets enumerating standard M3 design system sections the model already knows
findings.recommendation: Replace with a single outcome sentence

findings.title: UI-spec DOIT list is format templating
findings.evidence: Seven bullets listing standard UI spec sections

findings.title: Accessibility-check checklist is format templating
findings.evidence: Seven WCAG checkpoints the expert already knows
findings.recommendation: Replace checklist with a goal sentence

findings.title: Theme-validate comparison list is format templating
findings.evidence: Six comparison dimensions the role implies

findings.title: Theme-validate deviation process is numbered sequence
findings.evidence: Three sub-bullets describing sequential process

findings.title: Accessibility-check reporting format prescriptive
findings.evidence: Enumerates output fields instead of stating goal

findings.title: NEVER construction in design-system
findings.evidence: 'Ne jamais inventer' — ALL-CAPS prescriptive tone

findings.title: NEVER construction in ui-spec
findings.evidence: 'Ne jamais réinventer' — second instance of pattern

findings.title: Three redundant anti-patterns in CREED template
findings.evidence: Anti-patterns 1-3 restate rules from Core Values and Standing Orders
findings.recommendation: Drop or merge into relevant Core Value

findings.title: Meta-commentary before standing orders
findings.evidence: 'These are always active' — meta-explanation the model infers

findings.title: Verbose tool preference in CAPABILITIES template
findings.evidence: Three sentences saying the same directive

findings.title: CREED standing order references canon excluded from sanctum
findings.evidence: prompt-quality-canon.md is in SKILL_ONLY_FILES, not copied to sanctum
findings.recommendation: Remove canon pull-in from CREED since EVOLVABLE=False

findings.title: Pulse curation trigger on non-autonomous agent
findings.evidence: References 'during Pulse' but agent is memory-only

findings.title: customize.toml name field empty
findings.evidence: name = "" while SKILL.md frontmatter has name: agent-ux
findings.recommendation: Set name or leave empty for First Breath naming

findings.title: theme-validate does deterministic file comparison in a prompt
findings.evidence: Prompt instructs model to diff design docs — output is same for same inputs
findings.recommendation: Write a pre-pass script to extract and diff design tokens as JSON

findings.title: ADD — Infuse persona voice into capability prompts
findings.evidence: First Breath builds a warm persona; all 4 capability prompts are dry checklists
findings.recommendation: Open each capability with 1-2 lines of persona framing

findings.title: ADD — Graceful fallback when workspace files missing
findings.evidence: Assumes brainstorm.md and prd.md exist; no guidance if absent
findings.recommendation: Add soft-gate: offer to backfill context conversationally

findings.title: REMOVE — First Breath 10-step wrap-up ceremony
findings.evidence: 10 sequential procedural steps contradict the warm calibration tone

findings.title: ADD — Handle casual check-in in Waking mode
findings.evidence: No path for social opening; agent forced to offer capabilities
findings.recommendation: Add fork for casual openings before capabilities offer

findings.title: ADD — Support headless capability invocation
findings.evidence: All capabilities hardcode MASB workspace paths
findings.recommendation: Add input contract: accept inline inputs vs file lookup

findings.title: REMOVE — Vestigial --pulse reference
findings.evidence: --pulse mentioned but agent has no Pulse mode

findings.title: REMOVE — Contradictory 'stateless' language
findings.evidence: 'You are stateless' contradicts Sacred Truth continuity
findings.recommendation: Replace with 'Your working memory resets between sessions'

findings.title: Accessibility spread across 3 capabilities with unclear layering
findings.evidence: DS defines, AC audits, TV monitors — no documented boundary
findings.recommendation: Document layering explicitly in each capability

findings.title: No M3 compliance validation capability
findings.evidence: Persona is M3 specialist but no capability validates M3 guideline compliance
findings.recommendation: Extend TV to include M3 spec validation

findings.title: No iteration capability after validation
findings.evidence: DS figé after HITL, TV reports deviations with no revision path

findings.title: Zero-code vs CLI skills ambiguity
findings.evidence: CREED says 'ne jamais écrire de code' but references CLI tools
findings.recommendation: Clarify if CLI tools imply code generation or just guidance

findings.title: {project-root} placeholder mismatch in CREED Dominion
findings.evidence: Template uses hyphen but init-sanctum.py provides underscore
findings.recommendation: Change template to use {project_root} or add hyphen variant

findings.title: .memlog.md leaks into sanctum runtime
findings.evidence: Builder artifact copied by copy_references into agent's memory
